name: zgame_options_load_game_options
description: zGame::Options_LoadGameOptions creates gameplay/video/audio/input options, applies detail-profile defaults, loads registry overrides, rebuilds bindings, and releases the detail tree.
known_limits: The smoke verifies the minimal detail.zrd/default path, option creation, default bind groups, network reset, and cleanup. Binary-safe verification and full retail detail-profile coverage remain pending.
